title: Login Issues - Can't Access Account
desc: Customer cannot log in even after resetting the password multiple times.

title: Payment Failed During Checkout
desc: User reports payment failure when trying to complete the checkout process.

title: Unable to Download Invoice
desc: Customer cannot download the invoice from the billing section.

title: Profile Image Not Updating
desc: User tries to upload a new profile image but it does not update.

title: Dashboard Loading Very Slow
desc: The dashboard takes more than 20 seconds to load after login.

title: Email Notifications Not Received
desc: User is not receiving account notification emails.

title: Password Reset Link Expired
desc: Reset password link expires immediately after clicking.

title: Search Feature Not Working
desc: Users cannot find results when searching for products.

title: Error While Updating Address
desc: Customer receives an error when updating shipping address.

title: Order History Not Showing
desc: User cannot see previous orders in their account.
